blocks.title: Indoor air
blocks.content:
SUBSTANCES TO INDOOR AIR, SOIL

AND WATER DURING THE USE

STAG E

Cement is not in direct contact with indoor air. It is the cement-based products (concrete, mortar…) that are potentially in contact

with indoor air.

blocks.title: Soil and water
blocks.content:
Cement is not in direct contact with indoor air. It is the cement-based products (concrete, mortar…) that are potentially in contact

with indoor air.

Cement is not in direct contact withsoil and water. It is the cement-based products (concrete, mortar…) that are potentially in contact

with soil and water.

blocks.content:
